title: Language Change - Disconnecting/Connecting earbuds to check DFU pop up
scenario: Language update fails with "Update currently not available" popup when one earbud is disconnected, and popup persists even after earbud reconnects
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android
Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Scroll to and tap on 'Language' option
Select a different language from the list
Place one earbud (e.g., right) into the charge case so it disconnects
Tap 'Update Now' button on the Language update prompt
Tap 'Ok' on the popup to dismiss it
Reconnect the disconnected earbud by removing it from the charge case
Repeat steps 6-9 with the other earbud (left) disconnected
expected: When an earbud is disconnected, tapping "Update Now" should either proceed with the language update on the remaining connected earbud, or show a clear message indicating the need to reconnect the earbud. After reconnecting the earbud, the update should become available without requiring the user to manually dismiss a popup and re-navigate.
